name: Killer Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500 degrees.
2. Prepare a 9-inch springform pan by lining it generously with butter and patted with graham cracker crumbs.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, flour, orange zest, lemon zest, and vanilla until smooth.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the egg yolks and whipping cream.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared springform pan.
6. Bake for 10 minutes or until the top of the cake turns golden brown.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 200-225 degrees and bake for an additional hour.
8. Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool on a rack until it reaches room temperature.
9. Carefully release the sides of the pan, but do not remove the bottom.
10. Place the cake on a platter. Top with fruit or glaze, if desired, and serve.
